audit_items.proof_trace: The outer guard at L385 (`updatedAt < minTimestamp && feedInfo.usdDataFeed != address(0)`) exactly matches the property's gating condition; the data feed is never queried outside this guard. The inner `if (updatedAt < dataFeedUpdatedAt)` at L390 applies a 'most recent wins' refinement — when both sources are stale, the fresher one (Data Streams) is returned, which is intentional design confirmed by unit tests and in-code comments. Final staleness validation (L404-416) correctly uses the winning `updatedAt`, so the stale case is still caught.
